name: corgispec
description: OpenSpec GitFlow — AI-driven change management: propose → apply → review → archive with GitLab/GitHub issue tracking, checkpoint-based implementation, and cross-session memory

interface.longDescription: OpenSpec GitFlow 提供完整的 AI 驅動變更管理：propose → apply → review → archive。支援 GitLab/GitHub 雙平台 issue 追蹤、checkpoint 式逐步實作、五軸自動化審查（架構/安全/效能/品質/完整性）、Git worktree 隔離開發，以及跨 session 記憶持久化。內建 17 個 agent skills，適用於 OpenCode、Claude Code 和 Codex。
